title: lepidium niloticum
intro: Lepidium niloticum, also known as Nile cress or African cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and acting as an antioxidant. Lepidium niloticum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
